use rayon::prelude::*;

// GOOD: sequential for small collections
fn process_few_items() {
    let items = vec![1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
    let results: Vec<i32> = items.into_iter()
        .map(|x| x * 2)
        .collect();
}

// GOOD: par_iter for indexed collections
fn process_slice(data: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
    data.par_iter()
        .map(|b| b.wrapping_add(1))
        .copied()
        .collect()
}

// GOOD: par_bridge for non-indexed, large iterators only
fn process_stream(stream: impl Iterator<Item = Data> + Send) -> Vec<Output> {
    stream
        .par_bridge()
        .map(|d| transform(d))
        .collect()
}
